subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-17 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: Are you well? Are you all well? If you are not happy, who can be happy? Look at the people of the world
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @bringing forth results; fruit, @development of capacity and readiness, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
